name: Grain Goddesses

requirements.initiate:
to have 5 cult skills at 50%+ one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity, Examiners need
to be convinced at 3 of them.

cultSkills:
to be convinced at 3 of them.
Rune levels  need to have 3 cult skills at 100% one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity

Has to be a
woman Bold skills are mandatory
Cult Skills (Oath is taken at initiate)
Craft (Natural Substance)

holyDays:
Sea/Fertility/Clay, Fire/Fertility/Clay, Earth/Fertility/Clay
